label: Atlas Daily Sweep — yesterday's project-relevant ground truth
notes: Fires at 8:00 AM ET daily. Targets YESTERDAY's complete Atlas folder (today's is still being written by Pieces). Dispatches POST /api/agents/atlas_steward/run in audit_only mode. Steward produces: (a) machine-readable receipt at LEDGERS/BOXES/atlas/receipts/<ts>_run_<id>.json; (b) human-readable digest at LEDGERS/BOXES/atlas/digests/<yesterday>.md; (c) drift / handoff / atom candidates as drafts at LEDGERS/DRAFTS/ATOMIZATION/atlas_*_<yesterday>.md. Reconcile mode (live PROB/COMM appends) requires explicit dispatch via the API, not the cron path. Authored 2026-04-30 via ATOM-2026-04-30-0045 against PROB-2026-04-30-015.
